profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Arsy Buana Travelindo Tbk operates as a travel bureau in Indonesia and internationally. The company provides hotel rooms, land arrangements, and airlines tickets. PT Arsy Buana Travelindo Tbk was founded in 2016 and is based in Tangerang Selatan, Indonesia. PT Arsy Buana Travelindo Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Madinah Iman Wisata.
